description_long: This object is a classic office-style corded telephone with a rectangular base and a separate handset connected by a coiled cord. The base features a large numeric keypad, several function buttons, and a digital display screen angled for easy viewing. The handset rests securely in a molded cradle on the base, and the coiled cord is visibly attached to both the handset and the main unit. The phone is primarily constructed from dark-colored plastic with some metallic or rubberized buttons and a glass or plastic display. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and ease of use in a professional or semi-public environment. The object is compact, with a flat bottom surface suitable for placement on desks or counters.
description: A dark plastic office corded phone with a coiled cord, keypad, and angled digital display. The handset rests in a cradle on the rectangular base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the handset resting in its cradle and the angled display screen extending from the base.
description_view_1: Profile view highlighting the length of the handset and the coiled cord trailing from the base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the keypad, function buttons, and the digital display screen, with the coiled cord visible.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the keypad, display, and the ergonomic shape of the handset.
